_comment: StreamFusion feature manifest. Gating is retired: every feature ships to everyone (isFeatureEnabled() always returns true, and nothing here may set earlyAccess:true). The manifest remains only as a feature registry.

stream-info-editor.name: Stream Info Editor
stream-info-editor.description: Edit your Twitch title, category and tags from inside StreamFusion, with cloud-synced favorite presets and quick-swap hotkeys.
